classification.description: A stunning traditional South Asian Anarkali suit, featuring a rich maroon base. The fitted bodice is intricately embroidered with gold floral patterns and has a high collar and short sleeves. The voluminous, floor-length skirt is designed with elegant tiered layers, each edged with a broad gold border, and is complemented by a matching maroon dupatta draped over the shoulder, also adorned with gold embroidery and a border.
classification.pattern: Floral embroidery (on bodice and dupatta), solid (on skirt), tiered (skirt construction)
classification.occasion: Festive, wedding guest, formal event, cultural celebration, evening wear
classification.consumer_profile: Culturally aware, traditional fashion enthusiast, elegant dresser, special occasion shopper
classification.trend_notes: Classic ethnic wear, timeless design, rich jewel tones, intricate traditional embroidery

classification.description: A vibrant A-line pinafore dress, crafted from a rich African wax print fabric, is stylishly layered over a crisp white long-sleeved collared shirt. The ensemble is cinched at the waist with a wide, metallic gold-toned belt, and completed with a matching fabric bow tie, creating a sophisticated and culturally expressive look.
classification.material: Cotton (African wax print fabric for the dress, shirting cotton for the blouse)
classification.pattern: Geometric, abstract, block print, African wax print
classification.occasion: Office, business casual, cultural event, church, smart everyday
classification.consumer_profile: Young professional, culturally expressive, fashion-forward, statement dresser, appreciates unique prints
classification.trend_notes: African print fashion, cultural fusion, statement prints, layered dressing, modern workwear with a twist

classification.description: A confident woman is styled in a vibrant, monochromatic bright yellow athleisure set, featuring an oversized cropped hoodie and matching drawstring sweatpants. This casual ensemble is given a fashion-forward twist by being paired with sleek white pointed-toe ankle boots, creating an unexpected and bold street-style statement. The outfit exudes a playful yet chic vibe, perfect for a sunny outdoor setting.
classification.material: Fleece-back cotton blend (or similar soft knit fabric)
classification.occasion: Everyday, casual, street style, urban outing, relaxed social events
classification.consumer_profile: Gen-Z trend-forward, young adult, fashion-conscious, confident, urban style enthusiast
classification.trend_notes: Monochromatic dressing, athleisure chic, cropped silhouettes, unexpected footwear pairing (sweats with heels/boots), vibrant color trend

location_context.setting: Outdoor, urban, basketball court, coastal view

classification.description: This is a short-sleeved athletic polo shirt, specifically a sports jersey, worn by a male athlete. It features a two-tone blue design with prominent national branding and sports event logos, indicative of a team uniform. The garment is styled for performance and fan support, suitable for high-energy sporting events.
classification.material: Performance fabric (likely polyester blend or technical knit)
classification.consumer_profile: Sports enthusiasts, athletes, fans of the Indian cricket team, active individuals
classification.trend_notes: Performance wear, team merchandise, national pride in sports

classification.description: A striking vibrant red midi dress featuring a deeply plunging V-neckline and wide, structured shoulder straps. The bodice is meticulously tailored with visible button detailing down the front, cinching at the waist before flowing into a dramatically voluminous, gathered A-line skirt that falls to a midi length. This sophisticated silhouette exudes elegance and is styled with black patent slingback heels.
classification.material: structured woven fabric (e.g., sateen, cotton blend with body)
classification.occasion: evening, cocktail, formal, special event, gala
classification.consumer_profile: confident fashionista, event-goer, luxury consumer, young professional
classification.trend_notes: structured silhouette, vibrant color trend, modern classic, statement dressing

classification.description: A collection of comfortable and functional activewear garments suitable for yoga or light exercise. The outfits typically consist of soft, stretchy tops such as t-shirts and tank tops, paired with flexible bottoms like leggings, capris, or sweatpants, all designed for ease of movement and a relaxed fit.
classification.material: Knit (likely cotton blend, polyester blend with spandex)
classification.consumer_profile: Health-conscious individuals, fitness enthusiasts, mainstream activewear consumers
classification.trend_notes: Comfort-driven fashion, minimalist athleisure, functional apparel
